alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide (IAM, Sigma) at 25°C for 30 min.
cleavage agent: using sequencing-grade modified porcine trypsin (Promega) at a protein-to-trypsin ratio of 20:1.
instrument: analyzed using a 2D linear ion trap mass spectrometer (Orbitrap Elite ETD; Thermo Fisher)
ionization type: The electrospray voltage was set to 2.0 kV
labeling: Mass spectrometric analysis of proteomic changes confirmed the presence of these pathways
reduction reagent: using 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT, Merck) at 56°C for 45 min.
